name: Certificate timeline and chain visualization
description: Visualization component for certificate discovery results. Shows a timeline of certificate validity periods and a tree view of certificate chains. Integrated into the results viewer page when viewing certs scan results.
acceptance_criteria: Timeline chart renders on the certs results viewer page showing each certificate's not_before to not_after as a horizontal bar
Color coding: green for valid, red for expired, amber for expiring within 30 days
Hover/click a bar to see full cert details (subject, issuer, SANs, key type/size)
Self-signed certificates marked with a distinct icon/badge on the timeline
TLS chain view: tree showing the certificate chain (leaf -> intermediate -> root) for each TLS result
Hostname mismatch warnings displayed prominently on affected certificates
notes: Timeline data comes from CertsResult: ct_entries[].not_before/not_after and tls_results[].not_before/not_after/is_expired/is_self_signed/hostname_mismatch.
